Operation 'createPaste' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Added return value details and clarification about paste availability for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Creates a new paste. The request body should contain the raw paste content as UTF-8 text.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new paste with the provided content. The request body should contain the raw paste content as UTF-8 text. Returns the created paste object with its ID and metadata. The new paste is immediately available for retrieval and sharing.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains input requirements but lacks information about what is returned and the side effect of making the paste available. Added return value details and clarification about paste availability for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'deletePaste' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is too minimal. Added critical context about permanence, ownership restrictions, authentication requirement, and required parameters. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of the operation and authorization constraints.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a paste by its ID. The paste and all its content are removed and cannot be recovered. Only the paste owner can delete their pastes. Requires authentication and the paste ID.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is too minimal. Added critical context about permanence, ownership restrictions, authentication requirement, and required parameters. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of the operation and authorization constraints.
